evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SLA breach detection.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to trigger detection when an SLA is breached. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or API responses that confirm the existence of SLA definitions or the mechanism for detecting breaches. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks concrete data to support the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of SLA definitions (arrival windows, max wait, completion windows) provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
